summary: Recent updates to the libwebrtc build process included an adjustment to the **default configuration environment to version 150**, which helps ensure developers are using the latest supported features and optimizations for WebRTC, the technology behind video calls. Additionally, two new Python scripts were added: one checks for missing branch-head commits, and the other displays existing branch-head commits for libwebrtc. These scripts enhance the development workflow, making it easier for contributors to keep track of changes and maintain up-to-date builds, thus facilitating smoother collaboration and reducing potential delays in the project’s progress.
